statement: Every individual graded synapse in the pyloric network is dispensable: each synaptic conductance can be reduced toward zero without destroying the triphasic rhythm.
formal: For each synaptic conductance parameter s, a single-parameter sweep that reduces s over several orders of magnitude keeps the period-invariant phase distance below threshold, i.e. a large tolerated radius and a small maximum shape distance.
prediction: Every synaptic sweep shows a small maximum phase distance and a large tolerated radius; no single synapse is necessary for the triphasic pattern.
